subject: update log helm chart from 2 to 3.0.0
commit_message:
update log helm chart from 2 to 3.0.0

Change-Id: I84b218452315c2026fb443c85a0cfce04098b29e
Issue-ID: OOM-1361
Signed-off-by: Michael O'Brien <frank.obrien@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

note: will update common chart reference ~2.0.0 when the common chart is changed later to 3.0.0 - changing common first will require all of OOM to change at the same time

Error: Chart incompatible with Tiller v2.8.2

Patch Set 2:

forgot to upgrade this particular server

  282  wget http://storage.googleapis.com/kubernetes-helm/helm-v2.9.1-linux-amd64.tar.gz
  283  sudo tar -zxvf helm-v2.9.1-linux-amd64.tar.gz
  284  sudo mv linux-amd64/helm /usr/local/bin/helm
  285  helm version
  286  sudo helm serve &
  287  sudo helm repo add local http://127.0.0.1:8879
  289  sudo helm install local/onap -n onap --namespace onap -f onap/resources/environments/disable-allcharts.yaml --set log.enabled=true

known issue - commenting contrib for

Patch Set 2:

contrib:
  enabled: false
